_comment: Unified per-source/per-device STAR scheduled rules. POST each to /cloud-detection/rules; set {{SITE_ID}}. Tables ingestHealthBaseline / ingestHealthSourceStats must exist. Parser Drift ships separately (ingesthealth_detections_parser_drift_optional.template.json) and is OPTIONAL: needs per-environment tuning before enabling.

data.name: Ingest Health - Volume Spike vs Baseline
data.description: Ingest volume for the current hour-of-day is >= 3 sigma ABOVE the seasonal baseline. Source level by default; device level for sources in the ingestHealthDeviceLevel lookup (level column tags each alert). Excludes ingestHealthExclusions sources.

scheduledParams.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | lookup ih_dfield = device_field from ingestHealthDeviceLevel.csv by source =:anycase dataSource.name | let dpick = (ih_dfield == 'device.name' ? device.name : (ih_dfield == 'endpoint.name' ? endpoint.name : (ih_dfield == 'agent.uuid' ? agent.uuid : (ih_dfield == 'src_endpoint.hostname' ? src_endpoint.hostname : (ih_dfield == 'hostname' ? hostname : null))))) | let dauto = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let device = (ih_dfield ? (dpick ? dpick : dauto) : dataSource.name) | let level = (ih_dfield ? 'device' : 'source') | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | let hod = simpledateformat(timestamp, 'HH', 'GMT') | let mykey = format('%s||%s||%s', dataSource.name, device, hod) | lookup exp_gib, exp_ev from ingestHealthBaseline by srckey = mykey | filter exp_gib > 0 | group cur_gib = sum(gib), cur_events = count(), exp_gib = any(exp_gib), exp_ev = any(exp_ev), first_seen = oldest(timestamp), last_seen = newest(timestamp) by source = dataSource.name, device, hod, level | let dk = format('%s||%s', source, device) | lookup sig_gib, sig_ev from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | let z_gib = (sig_gib > 0 ? (cur_gib - exp_gib) / sig_gib : 0) | let z_ev = (sig_ev > 0 ? (cur_events - exp_ev) / sig_ev : 0) | filter z_gib >= 3 | columns source, device, level, hod, cur_gib, exp_gib, sig_gib, z_gib, cur_events, exp_ev, z_ev, first_seen, last_seen | sort -z_gib | limit 100

data.name: Ingest Health - Volume Drop vs Baseline
data.description: Ingest volume for the current hour-of-day is >= 3 sigma BELOW the seasonal baseline (collection loss). Source level by default; device level for sources in the ingestHealthDeviceLevel lookup (level column tags each alert). Excludes ingestHealthExclusions sources.

scheduledParams.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | lookup ih_dfield = device_field from ingestHealthDeviceLevel.csv by source =:anycase dataSource.name | let dpick = (ih_dfield == 'device.name' ? device.name : (ih_dfield == 'endpoint.name' ? endpoint.name : (ih_dfield == 'agent.uuid' ? agent.uuid : (ih_dfield == 'src_endpoint.hostname' ? src_endpoint.hostname : (ih_dfield == 'hostname' ? hostname : null))))) | let dauto = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let device = (ih_dfield ? (dpick ? dpick : dauto) : dataSource.name) | let level = (ih_dfield ? 'device' : 'source') | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | let hod = simpledateformat(timestamp, 'HH', 'GMT') | let mykey = format('%s||%s||%s', dataSource.name, device, hod) | lookup exp_gib, exp_ev from ingestHealthBaseline by srckey = mykey | filter exp_gib > 0 | group cur_gib = sum(gib), cur_events = count(), exp_gib = any(exp_gib), exp_ev = any(exp_ev), first_seen = oldest(timestamp), last_seen = newest(timestamp) by source = dataSource.name, device, hod, level | let dk = format('%s||%s', source, device) | lookup sig_gib, sig_ev from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | let z_gib = (sig_gib > 0 ? (cur_gib - exp_gib) / sig_gib : 0) | let z_ev = (sig_ev > 0 ? (cur_events - exp_ev) / sig_ev : 0) | filter z_gib <= -3 | columns source, device, level, hod, cur_gib, exp_gib, sig_gib, z_gib, cur_events, exp_ev, z_ev, first_seen, last_seen | sort z_gib | limit 100

data.name: Ingest Health - Ingest Lag (p95 over SLA)
data.description: End-to-end ingest latency p95 exceeds 15 minutes. Source level by default; device level for sources in the ingestHealthDeviceLevel lookup (level column tags each alert). Excludes ingestHealthExclusions sources.

scheduledParams.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | lookup ih_dfield = device_field from ingestHealthDeviceLevel.csv by source =:anycase dataSource.name | let dpick = (ih_dfield == 'device.name' ? device.name : (ih_dfield == 'endpoint.name' ? endpoint.name : (ih_dfield == 'agent.uuid' ? agent.uuid : (ih_dfield == 'src_endpoint.hostname' ? src_endpoint.hostname : (ih_dfield == 'hostname' ? hostname : null))))) | let dauto = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let device = (ih_dfield ? (dpick ? dpick : dauto) : dataSource.name) | let level = (ih_dfield ? 'device' : 'source') | let dk = format('%s||%s', dataSource.name, device) | lookup mon = total_events from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | filter mon > 0 | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min), p99_lag = p99(lag_min), median_lag = median(lag_min), events = count(), first_seen = oldest(timestamp), last_seen = newest(timestamp) by source = dataSource.name, device, level | filter p95_lag > 15 | columns source, device, level, p95_lag, p99_lag, median_lag, events, first_seen, last_seen | sort -p95_lag | limit 100
